# Khronos Fox glTF source

This directory contains the unmodified `glTF` form of the Fox sample from the
KhronosGroup `glTF-Sample-Assets` repository. It is source material for offline geometry
cooking and is not loaded by the runtime.

- Upstream: https://github.com/KhronosGroup/glTF-Sample-Assets/tree/5bad5aaa0bbb5d0f9cdc934e626f27d0df1e79b8/Models/Fox
- Pinned commit: `5bad5aaa0bbb5d0f9cdc934e626f27d0df1e79b8`
- `Fox.gltf` SHA-256: `6ddcabf511c0257b87dedf6ac51f1bdb6f21e570eee5fa7c4fa6162d055cb002`
- `Fox.bin` SHA-256: `c7d0d8de28a84d5b25623037f88e063e1502495a2ee6c55f182c61161ad12f80`
- `Texture.png` SHA-256: `61c8b109ee7f8bf262791933380fafb1465f7b51cbe6472c2d21eff0b31f83a1`

uses the geometry, and Experiment 0035 uses the base-color material and texture. The
source rig, skin bindings, and animation are used by Experiment 0036.
